complete_registration: Complete your registration securely and quickly.
dashboard_welcome: Welcome to Matdan Mitra. The system is currently monitoring in optimal state.
predictive_modeling: Predictive risk modeling based on historical incident data
please_select_region: Please select an option from the dropdown above to generate an AI predictive security model for that specific region.
citizenship_error: Indian citizenship is required to register as a voter.
age_error: You must be at least 18 years old to register.
timeline_subtitle: A step-by-step educational guide to understanding the democratic process.
step_1_desc: The Election Commission officially announces the election dates and schedule, marking the formal beginning of the democratic process.
step_2_desc: Candidates representing political parties or running independently submit their nomination papers to the returning officer.
step_3_desc: Officials verify the submitted nominations. Candidates are given a final deadline if they wish to withdraw their names from the ballot.
step_4_desc: Political parties rally and campaign to win voter support. All campaigning must strictly end 48 hours before polling begins.
step_5_desc: Registered voters arrive at their designated polling stations to cast their votes securely using Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs).
step_6_desc: Votes are securely counted in the presence of representatives. The final results are officially declared, deciding the elected representatives.
assistant_welcome: Hello! I am your Voter Education Assistant. Ask me anything about election dates, required documents, or registration processes.
based_on_eligibility: Based on your eligibility, please prepare the following documents for the next step.
visa_status: Valid Visa Status / Overseas Resident Permit
local_address: Local Address Proof (Utility Bill / Rent Agreement)
upload_desc: Please upload clear, legible copies of your required documents.
application_under_review: Your application has been received and is currently undergoing AI verification. You will receive an SMS/Email once your digital EPIC (Electors Photo Identity Card) is generated.

once_users_submit: Once users submit their registrations, they will appear here.
